Metadata.title: WebCode | Turnkey website for local business
Metadata.description: WebCode builds modern websites for offline businesses in Uzbekistan: website, CRM, Telegram/WhatsApp, domain and hosting in one launch-ready solution.

Hero.badge: CRM, Telegram/WhatsApp integration, domain and hosting - included
Hero.badgeMobile: CRM, Telegram, domain and hosting - included
Hero.description: <brand>WebCode</brand> builds modern responsive websites for offline businesses in Uzbekistan. You only pay for the website itself and get CRM, messenger integrations, domain and hosting included.

transaction.title: Responsive design
transaction.description: Websites work equally well on mobile phones and desktops.

system.title: Multilingual interface
system.description: The website launches in three languages: Russian, Uzbek and English.

Hero.orbit: Service for local businesses in Uzbekistan

Audience.title: Who a turnkey website from WebCode is for
Audience.description: <brand>WebCode</brand> is for businesses that need a turnkey website without extra complexity. We handle the entire process: structure, copy, positioning, design and launch, so that in the end you get not just a website, but a clear and sales-focused tool for attracting customers.

service.title: Service businesses
service.description: Repairs, construction, cleaning, delivery, installation, home services and field services.

medical.title: Healthcare and services
medical.description: Clinics, dentists, private specialists, consulting and education.

beauty.title: Beauty and wellness
beauty.description: Beauty salons, barbershops, cosmetology, studios and personal specialist brands.

auto.title: Auto and service
auto.description: Car services, detailing, dry cleaners, workshops and other local companies.

food.title: Cafes and restaurants
food.description: Venues that need to present themselves, their menu, services and offers beautifully and make the path to booking or inquiry easier.

business.title: Small and medium-sized businesses
business.description: Entrepreneurs and companies that need a website for growth, trust and new leads.
